title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
